'''kazhupu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fibrohyalinosis|fibrohyalinosis]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-zh-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fibrohyalinosis|fibrohyalinosis]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| kazhupu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || kæzhipith || kæzhipij || kæzhipish || kæzhipi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || kazhuzhuputh || kazhuzhupuj || kazhuzhupush || kazhuzhupu
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || kazhuputh || kazhupuj || kazhupush || kazhupu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || kazhufpufth || kazhufpufj || kazhufpufsh || kazhufpuf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || kazhuputhu || kazhupuju || kazhupushu || kazhupuku
|-
| [[Patient]] || kazhuputh || kazhupuj || kazhupush || kazhupu
|-
| [[Possessive]] || kazhuputhul || kazhupujul || kazhupushul || kazhupukul
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || kazhupuuthuthu || kazhupuujuju || kazhupuushushu || kazhupuuku
|-
| [[Dative]] || kazhuputhun || kazhupujun || kazhupushun || kazhupukun
|-
| [[Speaker]] || kazhuputhuoro || kazhupujuoro || kazhupushuoro || kazhupukuoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
